immediate_actions.step: Remove from heat source and remove clothing/jewelry near burn (unless stuck)
immediate_actions.note: Do not pull fabric stuck to skin

immediate_actions.step: Cool with cool running water for 10-20 minutes
immediate_actions.note: No ice, no butter, no creams — water only

immediate_actions.step: Call 911 for 3rd degree burns or large 2nd degree burns
Cover loosely with sterile dressing after cooling

next_steps.step: Monitor for infection: spreading redness, pus, fever
next_steps.when: hours to days after the burn

next_steps.step: Physician evaluation for all 2nd and 3rd degree burns
